message:
feat(cli): Replace all mock implementations with real functionality

BREAKING: CLI commands now use real backends instead of hardcoded values

## Security (security.ts)
- Real `npm audit` scanning for CVE detection
- Code pattern scanning for secrets (API keys, AWS keys, GitHub tokens)
- Dangerous code pattern detection (eval, innerHTML, SQL injection)

## Performance (performance.ts)
- Real system metrics via process.memoryUsage(), process.cpuUsage()
- Real HNSW entry counts via getHNSWStatus()
- JSON and Prometheus export formats

## Neural (neural.ts)
- Real ReasoningBank pattern retrieval via findSimilarPatterns()
- Proper Pattern type field access (id, type, confidence, usageCount)

## Embeddings (embeddings.ts)
- Real SQLite entry counting via sql.js
- Real HNSW status integration
- File size estimation fallback

## Claims (claims.ts)
- Real claims-based authorization with config files
- Wildcard matching (e.g., "swarm:*" matches "swarm:create")
- Role-based access control with default policies

## Transfer Layer
- NEW: Google Cloud Storage support (gcs.ts) via gcloud CLI
- Real IPFS HTTP fetch with gateway fallbacks (download.ts)
- Real IPNS resolution with multiple gateways (discovery.ts)
- GCS as primary upload target, IPFS fallback (publish.ts)

Published as @claude-flow/cli@3.0.0-alpha.82

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

   "type": "module",
   "description": "CLI module - command parsing, prompts, output formatting",
   "main": "dist/src/index.js",
